description_long: This advertising board features a large, rectangular display panel mounted on a sturdy metal pole, which is anchored into a solid concrete base. The front face of the board displays a vibrant advertisement for McDonald's, specifically promoting the Big Mac and its use of Canadian beef farmers, with clear images of burgers and bold text on a red gradient background. The rear of the board reveals a robust metal framework that supports the display, with visible brackets and structural reinforcements. The side views show the slim profile of the display panel and the depth of the supporting frame, emphasizing the industrial design. The materials used are primarily metal for the frame and pole, concrete for the base, and a likely composite or plastic surface for the display panel. The overall construction suggests durability and resistance to outdoor conditions, suitable for high-traffic urban environments.
description: A large, freestanding advertising board with a McDonald's Big Mac ad, supported by a metal frame and concrete base, designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full advertisement with images and text on the display panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the display and the depth of the supporting metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the metal support structure and mounting brackets behind the display panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and structural supports.
attribute_frame_design: thick steel frame with rectangular supports and visible mounting brackets
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed advertisement for McDonald's Big Mac featuring product images and promotional text
